india.title: Maximize Section 80C
india.description: Invest ₹1.5L in ELSS, PPF, or NPS to claim full 80C deduction in old regime

india.title: Additional NPS deduction
india.description: Claim extra ₹50,000 under Section 80CCD(1B) through National Pension System

india.title: New Regime advantage
india.description: Income up to ₹12.75L is effectively tax-free under new regime with 87A rebate

india.title: Claim HRA exemption
india.description: If you pay rent, claim HRA exemption to significantly reduce taxable income

us.title: Maximize 401(k) contributions
us.description: Contribute up to $23,500 pre-tax to 401(k) to reduce AGI and federal tax

us.title: Use an HSA for triple tax benefit
us.description: HSA contributions are pre-tax, grow tax-free, and withdrawals are tax-free for medical expenses

uk.title: Pension contributions save tax
uk.description: Each £1 in pension saves 20-45p in tax depending on your rate band

uk.title: Watch the £100K trap
uk.description: Income between £100K-£125,140 has an effective 60% rate due to personal allowance taper. Consider pension contributions to bring income below £100K

uk.title: Use your ISA allowance
uk.description: Invest up to £20,000/year in an ISA — returns are completely tax-free
